title: Operation Strong Hand
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Operation|more=Hand}}
'''Operation Strong Hand''' was the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Force's]] final push of the [[Black Fleet Crisis]].

After [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] convinced [[Wialu]] to contribute the illusionary skills of the [[White Current/Legends|White Current]] to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], a scheme was devised to crush the [[Yevetha]]n fleet at [[N'zoth]].

Under the command of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Etahn A'baht]] and his [[Commodore/Legends|Commodores]] [[Corgan]], [[Mauit'ta]], [[Morano]], [[Poqua]], and [[Grekk 9]], the New Republic forces inflicted heavy damage on the Yevethan fleet before the [[Camp Pa'aal Squadron]] survivors seized control of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] warships and fled to the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core]].
